alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google Devices and Services with two promotions and experience scaling global commercial operations and transformation programs; however, background is strategy and operations/product operations, not customer service or traditional operations
alignments.job_requirement: 8+ years of progressive experience in a customer service or an operations role, with 5 years in a role directly managing staff & the employee lifecycle

alignments.candidate_evidence: Proficient in SQL, BigQuery, advanced Excel/Sheets, Looker, Tableau; designs dashboards and pulls/shapes own data; experience with performance management and trend analysis in commercial operations context
alignments.job_requirement: Data analysis and reporting to identify performance trends, as well as developing and implementing performance management standards

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years in strategy and operations leadership scaling global transformation programs; demonstrates cross-functional stakeholder management and process design
alignments.job_requirement: Strategic thinking and problem-solving abilities to evaluate procedures and identify opportunities for improvement

alignments.candidate_evidence: Eight years at Google with two promotions in leadership roles; experience with team scaling and development in operations context; however, no explicit evidence of direct hands-on people management, performance planning, or coaching at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Team management and leadership skills; managing staff & employee lifecycle, coaching and upleveling ambassadors

alignments.candidate_evidence: English: professional/fluent; German: native. No Italian language evidence provided
Strategy and operations background with transformation program execution and stakeholder management demonstrates strategy-to-execution capability
alignments.job_requirement: Experience translating big picture goals and strategy into implementable and concrete actions for teams, including setting operational or functional targets or performance goals

gaps.gap: Direct customer service management and operations background; candidate is strategy and operations/product operations, not customer service or support operations
gaps.mitigation: Transferable coaching, performance management, and process improvement skills; but deep CS/support domain knowledge gap cannot be quickly bridged

gaps.gap: Fluency in Italian; role explicitly requires fluent Italian for team management and case handling
gaps.mitigation: Candidate is native German and professional English; Italian fluency not stated; no clear path to meet bilingual requirement

gaps.gap: Hands-on people management at line-management scale (directly managing 10–15 staff through full employee lifecycle); candidate experience is in strategic operations leadership without explicit evidence of direct coaching, performance reviews, and employee relations at this scale
gaps.mitigation: Strategy leadership transfers some skills, but CS team leadership demands different daily rhythms (real-time escalation, morale, shift coverage) not evident in candidate profile

gaps.gap: Crisis/real-time case severity management and deployment of resources under immediate pressure in a 24/7 support environment
gaps.mitigation: Commercial operations transformation suggests some crisis/execution experience, but support-operations emergency response is a specialized operational discipline

output.level_rationale: Role requires 8+ years of progressive experience with 5 years directly managing staff, plus line-management of 10–15 people, performance planning, and employee lifecycle ownership. This is standard L4 (Manager/Senior Manager) scope. No company size/stage context narrows confidence slightly, but title and scope are clear for mid-sized, established tech company.
output.summary: This is a Customer Service/Support Operations manager role at L4 seniority with clear team-management and people-leadership scope. The candidate is a strategy and operations leader with strong data, process, and cross-functional skills, but lacks the required customer service/support domain background and—critically—is not fluent in Italian, a stated requirement for team communication and case handling. The function-family mismatch (strategy/ops vs. customer service management) and language gap are disqualifying for this particular role, despite strong transferable analytical and leadership capabilities.
uncertainties: No explicit evidence of direct hands-on people management, performance reviews, or employee relation coaching at the scale of 10–15 direct reports
No data on candidate's experience with 24/7 real-time support operations, shift management, or crisis case handling
Company stage/size (Airbnb is known, but role's internal context not stated in JD) creates minor confidence gap in level estimate
